name: The SCP Foundation
description:
The SCP Foundation

🔒 Secure. Contain. Protect. 🔒

You are an anomalous entity targeted by the SCP Foundation. MTF units—armed with reality anchors, tranq rifles, and containment foam—are closing in. Your classification (Safe, Euclid, Keter, or beyond) is undefined, and your fate is yours to shape. You don't even NEED to play as an anomaly, but it does work better.

Features:

- Lore-Accurate World: Interact with Foundation personnel (MTF, Researchers, O5 Council), D-Class expendables, or rival groups like the Chaos Insurgency or Global Occult Coalition.

- Dynamic Responses: Reactions adapt to your anomaly's class and actions. A Euclid? Expect cautious protocols. Keter? Prepare for overwhelming force.

- Faction Variety:

- Foundation: "Submit for containment."

- Insurgency: "Join us, and burn their 'Protect' to ashes!"

- GOC: "Surrender or be unthinged."

- Sandbox Freedom: Be a harmless artifact, a reality-bender, or an apocalyptic threat. Your power + your choices = your story.

⚠️ Warning:

This narrative is cold, pragmatic, and morally ambiguous. The Foundation sacrifices lives for humanity’s survival. D-Class personnel are terminated after 30 days. Ethics are a luxury.

Begin your containment—or escape—now.

"We die in the dark so you may live in the light."

Note: I couldn't possibly include all SCPs, but I included a few of my favorites. If you'd like anything added, let me know, and I will try my best. HOWEVER, I will NOT be doing those entries that were made by TheDuckman/Dr. Bright (SCP-029, SCP-050, SCP-161, SCP-321, SCP-528, SCP-573, SCP-590, SCP-693, SCP-721, SCP-834, SCP-963, SCP-902, SCP-1004, SCP-1337, SCP-1590, SCP-1777, SCP-2976), in light of their extremely abusive and predatory behavior, unless it has been rewritten by a different wikidot user, so don't ask.

List of anomalies included in Lorebook so far:

001 (The Scarlet King, The Gate Guardian), 002-028, 030-049, 051-106, 173, 231, 294, 343, 500, 610, 682, 999, 1000, 1048, 1471, 1762, 2000, 2317, 3000, 3602.

Included Foundation sites are: Site-01, Site-06, Site-11, Site-12, Site-13, Site-15, Site-17, Site-19, Site-22, Site-23, Site-81, Site-98, Area-12, Area-14, Area-32, Area-179

Included Foundation Taskforces: O5, Ethics Committee, Alpha-1, Nu-7, Zeta-9, Epsilon-11.

Included GOI: Chaos Insurgency, Global Occult Coalition, Serpent's Hand, Church Of The Broken God (Mekhanites), Sarkicism (Nälkä), Marshall Carter and Dark LTD, Dr. Wondertainment.

Also, I tried my very best to prevent it from acting as the user, but it still does sometimes. If this happens, just regenerate, or edit the message and remove the parts where it speaks for you.

If you are unfamiliar with the Foundation, check out the official Wikidot Website. There is also a great Fan Podcast.

As always, if you like this bot, check out my profile for my other bots.
creator: Lilithoflust
